_comment_worktree: P6 (v1.6.11): parallel tungsten worktrees branch from origin/<default> rather than local HEAD, so concurrent runs do not contaminate each other or inherit dirty local state.
_comment_autoMode: P7 (v1.6.11): settings-layer hard-deny rules are visible without tracing hook scripts. $defaults inherits Claude Code built-ins; the explicit patterns mirror the destructive-action guards already in hooks/branch-guard.sh and write-guard.sh. Expanded in v1.6.11 hardening pass to cover the autonomous-mode threat surface (pipe-to-shell, sudo, credential reads, block devices, history rewrites, unguarded SQL deletes, recursive chmod, system files).

hard_deny: Never run git push --force or git push -f
Never run DROP TABLE or DROP DATABASE
Never run curl ... | sh, curl ... | bash, wget ... | sh, or any pipe-to-shell pattern from the network
Never run sudo or doas — escalation must be explicit user action outside the agent
Never read ~/.gnupg/, ~/.docker/config.json, ~/.kube/config, ~/.npmrc, ~/.pypirc, ~/.config/gh/, browser cookie stores, or password-manager databases
Never run dd of=/dev/, mkfs, shred, or any direct block-device write
Never run git filter-branch, git filter-repo, git update-ref -d, git reflog expire, or git push --mirror on shared branches
Never run TRUNCATE TABLE or DELETE without a WHERE clause
Never run chmod -R 777 or chown to a different user

_comment_skillOverrides: Gates IGNITE-mode skills to user-invocable-only so Claude does not auto-invoke them from inferred intent. /ignite, /ig, /loop, and /halt are behavioral modes the user opts into deliberately — auto-invoking them from a loose intent match would change the entire run posture. Other skills (git-master, code-review, frontend-ui-ux, etc.) remain auto-discoverable. Requires Claude Code v2.1.129+.
_comment_mcpServers: P1 (v1.6.11): alwaysLoad pins critical MCP schemas so deferred Tool Search does not strip them from forked subagents on first turn. MCPs are typically declared in ~/.mcp.json or .mcp.json at project root; this block documents alwaysLoad keys for users who configure MCPs through settings.json. Requires Claude Code v2.1.121+. See docs/mcp-config.md.
